_comment: IFR ATC response templates — Eurocontrol ICAO English phraseology. Merged with eu/vfr/atc_templates.json at load time; keys here extend (never override) VFR entries. Phase 4, Slice 1+2: Delivery clearance + startup + Tower departure flow.

IDLE._comment_ifr: IFR clearance request handled by Delivery. Added to VFR IDLE block on merge.

REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE.response: {callsign}, {airport} Delivery, cleared to {ifr_destination}, own navigation, climb to {ifr_initial_altitude}, squawk {squawk}, QNH {qnh}, information {atis_letter} current.

IFR/PREDEP_CLEARANCE._comment: Clearance issued. ATC waits for full readback before approving startup.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, read back IFR clearance in full.

IFR/CLEARED._comment: Startup approved. Pilot may request taxi or call Ground.

INITIAL_CALL_GROUND.response: {callsign}, {airport} Ground, taxi to holding point runway {runway} via Alpha, QNH {qnh}.

REQUEST_TAXI.response: {callsign}, taxi to holding point runway {runway} via Alpha, QNH {qnh}.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, startup approved, request taxi when ready.

IFR/TOWER_CONTACT._comment: Virtual state: reached when TOWER_CONTACT + departure intent + IFR squawk assigned. Produces an IFR-specific departure clearance without the VFR 'report downwind'.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, wind {wind}, cleared for takeoff. After departure climb runway heading, squawk {squawk}.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, wind {wind}, cleared for takeoff. After departure climb runway heading, squawk {squawk}.

IFR/DEPARTURE_CLEARED._comment: Takeoff clearance issued. Awaiting readback, then auto-corrects to IFR/EN_ROUTE once airborne.

IFR/EN_ROUTE._comment: Airborne IFR, pilot on Departure/Center frequency. Silent — no unsolicited ATC calls until approach phase (Slice 3+).
